summary: Vertical (9:16) video with a DHS/Know2Protect logo, blue-black color grade, and grainy thermal-style B-roll. All-caps title cards read 'WANT TO KNOW WHY?' and 'PROTECT YOURSELF'. One scene shows a teen hunched face-down on a bed with floating chat bubbles ('Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'WYD?', 'You up?'). A narrator speaks about a person named Kendall Carter, stating he is serving 30 years in federal prison, over an instrumental music bed.

script.scene: Near-black gradient with caption 'WANT TO KNOW WHY?' (KNOW in orange); instrumental music; narrator: 'Meet Kendall Carter. Kendall is spending 30 years in federal prison. Want to know why?'

Grainy high-contrast thermal/black-and-white abstract B-roll (haze over a bright bar of light); narrator: 'For over a year, he used multiple fake online profiles of teen boys and girls to meet kids. He groomed them.'

A teen is hunched face-down on a bed, head in arms, with floating chat bubbles above ('Girl, you a baddie. U look so good', 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'Everyone is gonna know', 'You ghosting me??', 'WYD?', 'You up?'); narrator states he tricked kids into sending images then threatened to leak them.

Dark cutaway footage; narrator: 'There were multiple victims, one as young as 12. This is called sextortion, and it's a crime,' and states Carter's devices held 100+ explicit images of minors. On-screen text states the 100+ figure.

Caption 'PROTECT YOURSELF' over the dark gradient; narrator: 'Nearly half of all kids have been approached online... Not everyone you meet online is who they say they are. Protect yourself online. Learn how at know2protect.gov.'

notable_text: WANT TO KNOW WHY?; PROTECT YOURSELF; Kendall Carter was in possession of 100+ sexually explicit images of minor females; chat bubbles: 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'WYD?', 'You up?', 'Girl, you a baddie. U look so good', 'Everyone is gonna know'
